name: Peanut Butter Crunchies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix brown sugar, margarine, peanut butter, egg and vanilla in a large bowl.
2. Stir in flour, baking soda and salt until combined.
3. Cover the mixture and refrigerate for at least 2 hours.
4. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
5. Shape the dough into 1-inch balls and roll each ball in cereal.
6. Place the shaped cookies about 2 inches apart on an ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Bake in the preheated oven for 12 to 13 minutes, or until they are almost no indentation when touched.
8. Makes about 4 1/2 dozen cookies.
